basic_details.job_title: Ordnance Factory Dehu Road Graduate / Diploma Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Dehu Road (OFDR) has published the Graduate / Diploma Project Engineer Notification 2026 on 2 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 13 Graduate / Diploma Project Engineer positions. Candidates within the age limit of up to 30 years (with applicable relaxation) and holding B.E./B.Tech or Diploma in Chemical/Mechanical with relevant apprenticeship/training are eligible to apply offline at ddpdoo.gov.in. The application process will be active from 2 May 2026 to 21 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 30 years for General Category. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC-NCL applicable.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years for General Category. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 Years OBC(NCL): 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech or Diploma in Chemical/Mechanical with minimum one year apprenticeship/training in Ordnance Factories or factories manufacturing military ammunitions and explosives.
qualification.details: Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer: B.E/B.Tech or Diploma in Chemical / Mechanical. Minimum one year training as per Apprenticeship Act 1961 in Chemical / Mechanical trade of Ordnance Factories under MIL or Ordnance Factories manufacturing Military Ammunitions and Explosive OR one year experience in Factories manufacturing Military Ammunitions and Explosives.

salary_details.pay_scale: 1st Year Rs. 36000/- to 4th Year Rs. 39338/- + DA
salary_details.details: 1st Year Rs. 36000/- 2nd Year Rs. 37080/- 3rd Year Rs. 38192/- 4th Year Rs. 39338/- + Dearness Allowance as per prevailing rate.

selection_process: Marks scored in B.E./B.Tech or Diploma Personal Interaction/ Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://munitionsindia.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ordnance Factory Dehu Road Project Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer posts is 21st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech or Diploma in Chemical/Mechanical engineering. Additionally, a minimum of one year of apprenticeship or training in relevant ordnance factories or ammunition manufacturing facilities is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Engineer positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the General category is 30 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST and OBC (NCL) candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves evaluating marks obtained in the B.E./B.Tech or Diploma, followed by a personal interaction or interview, and finally, document verification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Project Engineers?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 36,000/- in the first year to Rs. 39,338/- in the fourth year, plus Dearness Allowance as per prevailing rates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for any category of candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it by post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for Graduate/Diploma Project Engineers, divided between Mechanical and Chemical disciplines.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Project Engineer roles?
faq.answer: These positions are on a contract basis, offering a tenure-based engagement for the Project Engineers.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Ordnance Factory Dehu Road, which is https://munitionsindia.in.
